markers: Next.js app shell with embedded educational content
summary: This source project is primarily an application scaffold, but it contains reusable educational payload embedded in the dashboard UI and supporting API/parser code. No standalone lecture corpus or algorithm library was found. The strongest migratable material is tutorial/question content plus a small set of branding images.

tutorials.note: Largest embedded study module; includes flashcards, cases, guideline content, image-library metadata, and board-review workflows
Dashboard UI with generated questions, flashcards, study content, and sample educational data
Question-generation endpoint for board review practice
Anki upload/parser workflow with fallback educational cards
Card parsing and category tagging logic

recommendation: Migrate the tutorial/question subsystem first. Treat lectures and algorithms as absent unless future inspection finds hidden structured files outside the current app shell. Copying the branding images is optional and low value.
